title: 8 套日常穿搭编辑拼贴
description: Create a freeform fashion-editorial collage of me in 8 distinct full-body casual wear, arranged organically on a clean cream studio backdrop. Keep my face identical across all looks, w/ consistent proportions that visual
prompt_raw: Create a freeform fashion-editorial collage of me in 8 distinct full-body casual wear, arranged organically on a clean cream studio backdrop. Keep my face identical across all looks, w/ consistent proportions that visually read as around (height) w/o stating height. Include subtle handwritten-style arrows & labels highlighting key pieces. Avoid any grids, borders, or boxed layouts.
